title: Eternal Melody
description: An exploration of timeless jazz standards reimagined through contemporary production. Eternal Melody weaves together classic vocal techniques with modern electronic textures.

title: Midnight Sessions
description: Recorded live in Sofia's most intimate jazz club, Midnight Sessions captures the raw energy and spontaneity of late-night performances.

title: Velvet Skies
description: A collection of original compositions inspired by nocturnal landscapes. Velvet Skies blends atmospheric jazz with subtle electronic elements.

title: First Light
description: The debut album that introduced Ami Oprenova's distinctive voice to the jazz world. First Light showcases a fresh take on classic standards.
